focus_node: Phase 11.1 complete: text-similarity.sh with configurable --gram-size flag (2-6)

query_summary.intent: Add --gram-size flag to text-similarity.sh for configurable N-gram comparison (2-6)
key_findings: --gram-size flag added with range validation (2-6, defaults to 3)
Cache key now includes gram_size: file1|file2|gN
Different N values produce different similarity scores: bigram=85%, trigram=82%, pentagram=73%
Scan-all mode also updated with gram_size-aware caching
